name: PettingZoo (Multi-Agent RL Environment API)

performance.notes: Simulation speed depends on environment complexity

agent_readiness.notes: Multi-agent RL environment standard (Gymnasium for multi-agent). AEC API (Agent Environment Cycle) and Parallel API. from pettingzoo.classic import chess_v6. env = chess_v6.env(). env.reset(). for agent in env.agent_iter(): obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.last(). 70+ environments: classic games (chess, Go, poker), Atari multi-agent, MPE, SISL. Works with Stable Baselines3, RLlib, CleanRL multi-agent. Farama Foundation (same as Gymnasium).

gotchas: AEC API (turn-based) vs Parallel API has different interaction loops
Some environments require additional deps (pygame, chess library)
Less MARL algorithm support than single-agent RL libraries
Environment quality varies across the 70+ collection
best_when: Game-playing AI (chess, poker, Go) with RL
Benchmarking MARL algorithms across standard environments
Research requiring standardized multi-agent environment API
avoid_when: Custom environment creation (Gymnasium simpler for single-agent)
summary: PettingZoo is the standard multi-agent RL environment library (Gymnasium for multi-agent). 70+ environments: chess, Go, poker, Atari multi-agent, MPE. AEC API for turn-based, Parallel API for simultaneous-action envs. env.agent_iter() loop. Farama Foundation maintained. Works with MARL frameworks (RLlib, CleanRL MARL). Benchmark standard for multi-agent RL research.
